title: Rubies
description: This Forge mod adds all kinds of ruby items from ruby armor to ruby swords!
body:
**Ruby Mod for Minecraft (Forge 1.20.1)**

The **Ruby Mod** introduces **Rubies**, rare and valuable gems found around the Minecraft world. These gems are slightly rarer than diamonds but not nearly as rare as emeralds.

**Crafting Ruby Armor and Tools**
Once you discover rubies, you can craft a variety of tools and armor, all using conventional crafting recipes:

- **Ruby Tools**: Sword, Pickaxe, Axe, Hoe, Shovel

- **Ruby Armor**: Helmet, Chestplate, Leggings, Boots

**Ruby Advantages** - Rubies offer several unique advantages over other materials:

- **Durability**: Ruby items have a durability of 1024, which is two-thirds that of diamonds and four times that of iron, making them long-lasting and worth the effort in your adventures.

- **Enchantability**: Ruby armor and tools have a higher enchantability compared to diamond or iron, though slightly less than gold. This offers a great balance between strength and enchantability. Higher enchantability means better chances of obtaining powerful enchantments like Unbreaking III, potentially making ruby armor almost as durable as netherite and highly effective in battles.

**Conclusion**
The Ruby Mod enhances Minecraft 1.20.1 gameplay by adding rubies and allowing the crafting of tools and armor that are visually stunning, highly enchantable, and durable. This mod will add more strategy and excitement to your mining and crafting experience.

Enjoy exploring the new possibilities with the Ruby Mod! If you need any more details or have specific questions, feel free to ask.
